caption.val: show reaction forces in force diagram

objColor.dynamicr: If[mode ≟ 1, If[step ≟ 4 ∨ step ≟ 5, 1, 0], If[mode ≟ 2, If[node ≟ 2 ∨ node ≟ 3, 1, 0.6], 0]]
objColor.dynamicg: If[mode ≟ 1, If[step ≟ 4 ∨ step ≟ 5, 0.5, 0], If[mode ≟ 2, If[node ≟ 2 ∨ node ≟ 3, 0.5, 0.6], 0]]
objColor.dynamicb: If[mode ≟ 1, If[step ≟ 4 ∨ step ≟ 5, 0, 0], If[mode ≟ 2, If[node ≟ 2 ∨ node ≟ 3, 0, 0.6], 1]]
